name: Pipeline Bakeshop & Creamery
tagline: Kaimuki's cult-favorite bakery — the 'Malamode' (malasada + ice cream) and Cake Bombs are modern Hawaii classics.
talkStory: Founded by Katherine Kim in Kaimuki, Pipeline invented the 'Malamode' -- a malasada split open and stuffed with house-churned ice cream in flavors like ube, haupia, and Kona coffee. The concept went viral on social media and spawned a cult following. The Cake Bombs (miniature layered cakes) are another Kim original. She named the bakery after Pipeline on the North Shore, and the surf-inspired branding reflects her local roots. Arrive early -- the ube Malamodes sell out first.
